title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Securities

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Securities
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!
